column1: 言わずとも、分かっているはずだ。
column2: いわずとも、わかっているはずだ。
column3: Even without saying it, you should understand.
column4: ずとも (even without ~, without needing to — formal literary)
column6: formal literary expression meaning something is possible or true even without doing the action
column8: ずとも = without needing to (literary formal); なくても = even without (general); ないでも = same (casual); なしに = without (noun-based)
